name: Rylin
bio:
Demon-Purging Arrow, Demon Hunter Archer. He protects his homeland with precise shots and defends justice by fending off demons with arrows.

Role: Physical Grievous Wound
Intro: A Physical Damage Dealer hero that deals Physical Damage to multiple enemies and reduces their received healing.

skillSlots.name: Arrowstorm
skillSlots.description: Attacks backline Enemies for 122% P.DMG and reduces target's Healing received by 15% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Hunter Instinct
skillSlots.description: Increases ATK by 10% and HP by 5%.
